lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: What do you want, civilian?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: What does it look like I'm doing? I'm training this useless bunch of recruits!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, they look very fit.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: They're nothing but a useless bunch of weaklings who won't survive an hour once they're out on patrol.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Have you lost your mind? Earlier you said they looked fit! Just go away and leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, they look very weak.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Show some respect when you talk about my men, civilian!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Have you lost your mind? Earlier you said they looked weak! Just go away and leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some armour like yours?

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Only guards of Varrock can wear this armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I could become a guard of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Oh yeah? I see you've got a Thieving level of [thieving level]. That must give you quite a long criminal record.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could repent of my evil ways if you like.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: So you really want to be a guard, huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that's right.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Does it worry you that the life expectancy of a guard is about 30 seconds?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, that doesn't worry me.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Bah! You just failed the intelligence test. Go away, civilian.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget it.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Go away, coward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want nothing.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Lucky you. Go away.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Make those dummies suffer!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Imagine it's your aunt!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: You won't last 2 minutes in the real world!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Show some backbone!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Let's get some proper bloodlust here!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Bah, why do I bother with you lot?

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Just hit the thing already!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Hit the dummy! Hit the dummy!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Useless! Utterly useless!

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Hit the dummy before I come over there and hit you!
